title: Engineering Notes Home
body: Landing page for my personal engineering wiki. Architecture notes, Go patterns, and learning write-ups live here. Start with the index below.

title: Go Patterns I Keep Reaching For
body: Context propagation, errgroup for fan-out, functional options for constructors, and table-driven tests. Examples pulled from go-snippets and Ridgeline.

title: Error Handling and Wrapping in Go
body: When to use fmt.Errorf with %w, sentinel errors vs typed errors, and errors.Is/errors.As. Notes from reading the stdlib and Designing Data-Intensive Applications.

title: Terraform Module Layout for Side Projects
body: How I structure Terraform for ridgelinesystems.com: root env modules, remote state in S3 with DynamoDB locking, and reusable network/compute modules. Keep secrets out of state.

title: Observability 101: Logs Metrics Traces
body: The three pillars and where each helps. Structured logging with slog, Prometheus metrics, and OpenTelemetry traces. What I wired into Ridgeline via Datadog and Sentry.

title: Incident Response Runbook (Personal Projects)
body: Lightweight incident process for Ridgeline and Glanceboard: acknowledge PagerDuty, declare severity, mitigate, then write a blameless postmortem. Templates linked below.

title: Reading Notes: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
body: Chapter-by-chapter notes. Replication, partitioning, consistency models, and the trouble with distributed transactions. Mapping ideas back to Postgres and my homelab.

title: Context and Cancellation Cheatsheet
body: Quick reference for context.Context: deadlines, cancellation propagation, and the never-pass-nil-context rule. Pitfalls I hit in Ridgeline's HTTP handlers.

title: Cascade Code Collective: Meeting Notes 2026-01-14
body: Planning the Q1 hackathon. Sofia Reyes on the landing page, Daniel Okafor on the data track, Nina Kowalski coordinating scope. Action items captured below.

title: Profiling Go with pprof
body: Capturing CPU and heap profiles, reading flame graphs, and the allocation reduction that cut Ridgeline's import job memory by a third. Commands and gotchas.

title: Ridgeline Home
body: Ridgeline is my self-hosted read-it-later tool for developers. Go and PostgreSQL backend, React and Tailwind frontend, deployed on the homelab K8s cluster. Architecture docs below.

title: Ridgeline System Design Overview
body: High-level architecture: API service, background worker for fetch/parse, Postgres, and Algolia for search. Request flow, component boundaries, and scaling assumptions.

title: Ridgeline Auth Flow
body: Email plus password with Argon2id hashing, session cookies, and optional OAuth via GitHub. Token rotation, CSRF handling, and the password reset flow are documented here.

title: Ridgeline Database Schema
body: Tables: users, bookmarks, tags, bookmark_tags, and fetch_jobs. Indexes, foreign keys, and the migration strategy using golang-migrate. ER diagram attached.

title: Ridgeline Deploy Pipeline
body: GitHub Actions builds and pushes a container image, then Argo CD syncs the manifest to the homelab cluster. Blue/green via two deployments and a Service selector swap.

title: Ridgeline Search Architecture
body: How bookmarks get indexed into Algolia, the async indexing worker, and the fallback to Postgres full-text search when the index is cold. Latency budget and cost notes.

title: Ridgeline Billing Integration (Stripe)
body: Stripe Checkout for the Pro tier, webhook handling for subscription events, and idempotency keys. Reconciliation job notes after a duplicate-charge scare in March.

title: Ridgeline API Versioning Decision
body: ADR: URL-path versioning (/v1) over header-based negotiation for simplicity. Trade-offs, deprecation policy, and how the React client pins to a version.

title: Homelab Home
body: Index for homelab operations. Three-node K3s cluster on mini PCs, MetalLB for load balancing, and Longhorn for storage. Runbooks for recovery and backups below.

title: Homelab Kubernetes Recovery Runbook
body: Recovering the K3s control plane after a node failure: restore etcd snapshot, rejoin agents, and re-establish MetalLB. Step-by-step with the exact kubectl and k3s commands.

title: Postgres Backup and Restore Runbook
body: Nightly pg_dump to S3 via a CronJob, point-in-time recovery with WAL archiving, and the tested restore procedure. Includes the quarterly restore drill checklist.

title: Homelab Certificate Renewal Runbook
body: cert-manager with Let's Encrypt and Cloudflare DNS-01 challenges. What to do when a renewal fails and ridgelinesystems.com throws TLS errors. Manual renewal fallback steps.

title: Homelab Network and Ingress Setup
body: Traefik ingress, MetalLB address pool, and the Cloudflare Tunnel that exposes Glanceboard without opening ports. VLAN layout and static DHCP reservations.

title: Homelab Disk Pressure Incident Postmortem
body: Longhorn volumes filled up and evicted pods. Root cause was unrotated container logs. Timeline, mitigation, and the log-rotation fix now baked into the node image.

title: Glanceboard Uptime Monitoring Setup
body: Glanceboard polls homelab services and pushes status to a public page. Uptime checks, alert thresholds, and the PagerDuty integration for after-hours pages.
